channel.title: Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL Source
item.description:
About

Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL is a fully-managed database service that helps you set up, maintain, manage, and administer your PostgreSQL relational databases on Google Cloud Platform.

If you are new to Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL, you can try creating and connecting to a database by following these instructions.

Available Tools

Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL Source Tools

Tool Name Description
vector-assist-apply-spec The "vector-assist-apply-spec" tool automatically executes all SQL recommendations associated with a specific vector specification or table to finalize the vector search setup.
vector-assist-define-spec The "vector-assist-define-spec" tool defines a new vector specification by capturing the user's intent and requirements for a vector search workload, generating SQL recommendations for setting up database, embeddings, and vector indexes.
vector-assist-generate-query The "vector-assist-generate-query" tool produces optimized SQL queries for vector search, leveraging metadata and specifications to enable semantic and similarity searches.
vector-assist-modify-spec The "vector-assist-modify-spec" tool modifies an existing vector specification with new parameters or overrides, recalculating the generated SQL recommendations to match the updated requirements.

Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL Source maintains full compatibility with PostgreSQL, allowing you to use the following tools with this connection:
